entity.summary: Onchain perpetuals decentralized exchange on Base providing leveraged crypto, foreign-exchange, commodity, and other synthetic global-asset markets backed by USDC liquidity vaults.
entity.notes: Current first-party documentation identifies Avantis as an advanced onchain exchange for cross-asset leverage with synthetic crypto, forex, and commodity markets, USDC liquidity vaults, trading tools, and developer interfaces. Current independently maintained metrics report substantial non-zero perpetual volume, fees, TVL, and open interest. No exact launch date, legal jurisdiction, predecessor, successor, or terminal lifecycle fact is asserted.

evidence.title: Avantis official documentation
evidence.notes: First-party documentation describes Avantis as an onchain exchange for leveraged crypto and global synthetic assets, with perpetual trading, liquidity vaults, risk-management features, and developer tooling.

evidence.title: Avantis protocol metrics
evidence.notes: Current protocol metrics report non-zero 24-hour, 7-day, and 30-day perpetual volume together with TVL, fees, and open interest, supporting active classification.
